title: Could there be support for more dynamic module parameter overriding at runtime?
body:
I enjoy using the `-G` compile flag to customize module parameters. However, my applications would benefit from overriding module parameters at runtime, for example by sending different values to the V... module constructor in C/C++ code. For example, I would like to populate the parameter values via CLI arguments to my application.

Could there be a way to do `-G` at runtime?
